moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 heats up
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 is currently underway, with group stage matches and early knockout rounds dominating headlines and fan conversations across the UK.

angles.name: Match Day Fever
angles.copy: Who are you backing in the World Cup today? The action is coming thick and fast as the group stages conclude and the knockouts begin!

angles.name: Fan Zone Buzz
angles.copy: Football's coming home (maybe)? The World Cup vibes are massive right now, keeping us on the edge of our seats. What's been your favourite moment so far?

moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 serves up action
moments.blurb: The iconic Wimbledon Championships begin on Monday, June 29, bringing two weeks of world-class tennis to the All England Club.

angles.name: Anticipation Build-up
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! Wimbledon 2026 kicks off on Monday. Who are you hoping to see crowned champion this year?

angles.name: Grand Slam Buzz
angles.copy: The grass courts are calling! Wimbledon is just days away, bringing all the drama and excitement of Grand Slam tennis to London.

moments.title: Love Island 2026 drama continues
moments.blurb: The 13th series of Love Island, hosted by Maya Jama, is in full swing nightly on ITV2 and ITVX, with plenty of villa drama keeping viewers hooked.

angles.name: Daily Recaps
angles.copy: Did you tune into Love Island last night? The villa is heating up! Who's your favourite couple (or biggest troublemaker)?

angles.name: Bombshell Alerts
angles.copy: Another day, another bombshell! Love Island is delivering all the drama we crave. What's your prediction for tonight?

moments.title: Mick Fleetwood is 79 today
moments.blurb: Legendary drummer and co-founder of Fleetwood Mac, Mick Fleetwood, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Fleetwood Mac Icon
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Mick Fleetwood! The heartbeat of Fleetwood Mac, still rocking it. What's your favourite Mac track?

angles.name: Drumming Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating Mick Fleetwood's 79th today! His distinctive drumming is integral to some of the greatest rock songs ever made.

moments.title: Curt Smith of Tears for Fears is 65
moments.blurb: Curt Smith, the co-founder, bassist, and vocalist of the iconic new wave band Tears for Fears, turns 65 today.

angles.name: Tears for Fears Voice
angles.copy: Happy 65th Birthday to Curt Smith! The voice behind so many Tears for Fears classics. Which one is on your playlist today?

angles.name: New Wave Legend
angles.copy: Shout out to Curt Smith, turning 65 today! Still making incredible music with Tears for Fears. What's your top TFF song?

moments.title: Dire Straits' John Illsley is 77
moments.blurb: John Illsley, the acclaimed bassist and co-founder of the legendary rock band Dire Straits, celebrates his 77th birthday today.

angles.name: Dire Straits Bassman
angles.copy: A huge Happy 77th Birthday to Dire Straits' own John Illsley! The man whose basslines defined an era. What's your favourite Dire Straits hit?

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 77th to John Illsley of Dire Straits! His contribution to rock music is immeasurable.

moments.title: Carly Simon turns 81
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer-songwriter Carly Simon, known for hits like 'You're So Vain,' celebrates her 81st birthday tomorrow.

angles.name: Iconic Songwriter
angles.copy: Happy 81st Birthday to the incredible Carly Simon tomorrow! Her songs are timeless. Which one is your all-time favourite?

angles.name: Timeless Voice
angles.copy: Celebrating Carly Simon's 81st tomorrow. Her powerful songwriting and distinctive voice have captivated generations.

moments.title: Benson Boone is 23 tomorrow
moments.blurb: Rising pop sensation Benson Boone, known for his hit 'Beautiful Things,' celebrates his 23rd birthday tomorrow.

angles.name: Pop Star's Birthday
angles.copy: Tomorrow, Benson Boone turns 23! Send your birthday wishes to the 'Beautiful Things' singer. What's your favourite track?

angles.name: Rising Talent
angles.copy: Happy 23rd Birthday for tomorrow to Benson Boone! Already dominating the charts, his future is looking very bright.

moments.title: Ariana Grande turns 33
moments.blurb: Global pop superstar and actress Ariana Grande celebrates her 33rd birthday on Thursday, June 26.

angles.name: Pop Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 33rd Birthday to Ariana Grande on Thursday! What's your ultimate Ariana anthem?

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Ariana Grande turns 33 this week. Her music always brings the good vibes.

moments.title: Mick Jones of The Clash is 71
moments.blurb: The legendary guitarist and co-founder of punk rock pioneers The Clash, Mick Jones, celebrates his 71st birthday on Thursday.

angles.name: Punk Rock Pioneer
angles.copy: Happy 71st Birthday to Mick Jones of The Clash on Thursday! A true punk rock legend. What's your favourite Clash track?

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Celebrating the iconic Mick Jones, who turns 71 this week! His guitar work with The Clash changed music forever.

moments.title: OneRepublic's Ryan Tedder is 47
moments.blurb: Hit songwriter and lead singer of OneRepublic, Ryan Tedder, celebrates his 47th birthday on Thursday, June 26.

angles.name: Songwriting Genius
angles.copy: Happy 47th Birthday to Ryan Tedder of OneRepublic on Thursday! A master songwriter behind so many hits for himself and others. What's your favourite?

angles.name: OneRepublic Frontman
angles.copy: Celebrating Ryan Tedder's 47th this week! From 'Apologize' to 'Counting Stars', his music is always on point.

moments.title: Bruce Johnston of The Beach Boys is 83
moments.blurb: Bruce Johnston, long-time member of The Beach Boys, known for his harmonies and songwriting, celebrates his 83rd birthday on Friday, June 27.

angles.name: Beach Boys Harmony
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 83rd Birthday to Bruce Johnston of The Beach Boys this Friday! Who doesn't love those harmonies?

angles.name: Surf Rock Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating Bruce Johnston's 83rd! His contributions to The Beach Boys' iconic sound are timeless.

moments.title: Cheryl Ann Tweedy (Cheryl Cole) turns 43
moments.blurb: Former Girls Aloud star and pop icon Cheryl Ann Tweedy, known professionally as Cheryl, celebrates her 43rd birthday on Monday, June 30.

angles.name: UK Pop Queen
angles.copy: Happy 43rd Birthday to the one and only Cheryl on Monday! From Girls Aloud to solo stardom, she's a true UK pop queen. What's your favourite Cheryl track?

angles.name: Girls Aloud Legacy
angles.copy: Celebrating Cheryl's 43rd this week! Still adored by fans, her impact on British pop is undeniable.

moments.title: Blondie's Debbie Harry is 81
moments.blurb: The iconic lead singer of new wave pioneers Blondie, Debbie Harry, celebrates her 81st birthday on Tuesday, July 1.

angles.name: Blondie Legend
angles.copy: Happy 81st Birthday to the incredible Debbie Harry this Tuesday! The ultimate rock icon. What's your favourite Blondie hit?

angles.name: New Wave Queen
angles.copy: Celebrating the ageless Debbie Harry, turning 81 this week! Her style and sound are as influential as ever.

moments.title: Missy Elliott turns 55
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper, singer, songwriter, and producer Missy Elliott celebrates her 55th birthday on Tuesday, July 1.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Innovator
angles.copy: Happy 55th Birthday to the legendary Missy Elliott this Tuesday! A true pioneer who changed the game. What's your top Missy track?

angles.name: Unforgettable Hits
angles.copy: Celebrating Missy Elliott's 55th! Her music videos and beats are iconic. What's your favourite Missy moment?

moments.title: Paloma Faith is 41
moments.blurb: Multi-award-winning British singer-songwriter and actress Paloma Faith celebrates her 41st birthday on Tuesday, July 1.

angles.name: British Soul Sensation
angles.copy: Happy 41st Birthday to the fabulous Paloma Faith this Tuesday! Her unique voice and style always stand out. What's your favourite Paloma song?

angles.name: Chart Success
angles.copy: Celebrating Paloma Faith's 41st! From 'Stone Cold Sober' to 'Only Love Can Hurt Like This', her music is always a favourite.

moments.title: Michelle Branch turns 43
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer-songwriter Michelle Branch, known for hits like 'Everywhere' and 'Are You Happy Now?', celebrates her 43rd birthday on Wednesday, July 2.

angles.name: Pop-Rock Anthem Queen
angles.copy: Happy 43rd Birthday to Michelle Branch this Wednesday! Her early 2000s hits are still iconic. What's your favourite?

angles.name: Timeless Tracks
angles.copy: Celebrating Michelle Branch's 43rd! From 'Everywhere' to 'The Game of Love', her music holds a special place in our hearts.

moments.title: Burna Boy is 35
moments.blurb: Grammy Award-winning Nigerian superstar Burna Boy, a leading figure in Afrobeats, celebrates his 35th birthday on Wednesday, July 2.

angles.name: Afrobeats King
angles.copy: Happy 35th Birthday to the incredible Burna Boy this Wednesday! The African Giant is always bringing the heat. What's your favourite track?

angles.name: Global Superstar
angles.copy: Celebrating Burna Boy's 35th! His music continues to dominate charts worldwide. What song are you vibing to today?

moments.title: Vince Clarke turns 66
moments.blurb: Electronic music pioneer Vince Clarke, co-founder of Depeche Mode, Yazoo, and Erasure, celebrates his 66th birthday on Thursday, July 3.

angles.name: Synth-Pop Master
angles.copy: Happy 66th Birthday to the legendary Vince Clarke this Thursday! From Depeche Mode to Erasure, his electronic genius is unmatched. What's your favourite track?

angles.name: Electronic Music Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating Vince Clarke's 66th! The man behind some of the most iconic synth-pop hits of all time. Which project is your favourite?

moments.title: Boyzone's Shane Lynch is 50
moments.blurb: Irish singer and member of the hugely successful boy band Boyzone, Shane Lynch, celebrates his 50th birthday on Thursday, July 3.

angles.name: Boy Band Heartthrob
angles.copy: Happy 50th Birthday to Shane Lynch of Boyzone this Thursday! The Irish charmer who gave us so many classic hits. What's your favourite Boyzone song?

angles.name: Pop Star Milestone
angles.copy: Celebrating Shane Lynch's big 5-0! Boyzone brought us endless smash hits and memories. Which one takes you back?

moments.title: Post Malone turns 31
moments.blurb: Grammy-nominated rapper, singer, and songwriter Post Malone celebrates his 31st birthday on Friday, July 4.

angles.name: Genre-Bending Star
angles.copy: Happy 31st Birthday to Post Malone this Friday! From 'Rockstar' to 'Circles', he's constantly redefining music. What's your favourite track?

angles.name: Chart Dominator
angles.copy: Celebrating Post Malone's 31st! His unique sound and massive hits make him a true force in music today.

moments.title: John Waite is 75
moments.blurb: British rock singer John Waite, known for his work with The Babys, Bad English, and his solo hit 'Missing You,' celebrates his 75th birthday on Friday, July 4.

angles.name: Rock Ballad King
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the incredible John Waite this Friday! 'Missing You' is an absolute classic. What's your favourite of his songs?

angles.name: Voice of a Generation
angles.copy: Celebrating John Waite's 75th! From The Babys to Bad English and his solo career, he's given us so many unforgettable rock anthems.

moments.title: Ralph Johnson of Earth, Wind & Fire is 75
moments.blurb: Ralph Johnson, the long-time percussionist and vocalist for the legendary funk and soul band Earth, Wind & Fire, celebrates his 75th birthday on Friday, July 4.

angles.name: Funk & Soul Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to Ralph Johnson of Earth, Wind & Fire this Friday! The man bringing the rhythm to timeless classics. What's your favourite EWF track?

angles.name: Legendary Percussionist
angles.copy: Celebrating Ralph Johnson's 75th! Earth, Wind & Fire's music is pure joy and his contribution is key to their sound.
